name: @blemmy/engine
description: Constraint-driven document layout engine — generic 8-stage pipeline for precision A4 print layout.
_comment: v3.0: Engine files now physically live in this directory.
The engine is fully decoupled from CVData. Callers provide an
EngineDocumentSpec (document-spec.ts) that maps logical section names
to DOM element IDs. The CV application wires this via cv-document-spec.ts.
Consumed via the @lib/engine Vite alias within the monorepo.
Future: extract to a standalone npm package when a second consumer exists.
Commercial licensing available alongside the AGPL terms — see LICENSE.
